news.headline: Upland Altify, powered by Altify MaxAI (Nasdaq: UPLD), enhances sales productivity with AI-enabled solutions for account planning & deal management.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Upland Software, Inc. (Nasdaq: UPLD) unveiled the integration of Altify MaxAI into Upland Altify, revolutionizing sales productivity through advanced account planning and deal management software. Altify, known for simplifying intricate sales processes, aims to enhance efficiency and performance for sales professionals. This move solidifies Upland's position as a key player in AI-driven cloud software for digital transformation.

news.headline: AirX Climate Solutions, Inc. has acquired Powrmatic USA, a specialty HVAC designer and manufacturer. Oklahoma City, Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: In Oklahoma City on December 4, 2024, AirX Climate Solutions, Inc. (ACS), a prominent specialist in HVAC solutions, revealed the acquisition of Powrmatic USA, a top designer and manufacturer in the HVAC industry. The move marks a significant development in the sector as ACS aims to expand its capabilities with Powrmatic's expertise in providing cooling and heating solutions. The deal showcases ACS's strategic approach to growth and positioning in the market, signaling its intent to capitalize on the increasing demand for HVAC services. This acquisition reinforces ACS's position within the industry, leveraging Powrmatic's established reputation and experience to enhance its services and offerings.

news.headline: Analyst highlights Foot Locker's positive moves.
Global human organoids market valued at $1.19 billion in 2024, projected to reach $2.33 billion by 2029, with a 14.4% CAGR.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of December 4, 2024, the global market for human organoids is worth approximately USD 1.19 billion. Projections indicate that this market is expected to grow to USD 2.33 billion by 2029, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.4% over the forecast period. The expansion of the human organoids market is primarily fueled by factors such as...

news.headline: Investors excited about potential defense windfall under Trump administration.
Undercover investigation reveals cruel conditions at NJ pet stores, urging shoppers to avoid supporting puppy mills.
news.summary: An undercover probe conducted by the Humane Society of the United States uncovered alarming conditions at New Jersey pet stores and the dog breeders supplying them. The investigation, released on December 4, 2024, during the peak puppy purchasing period of the holiday season, brought to light distressing realities. The findings exposed concerning practices at commercial breeders and pet stores, raising concerns about animal welfare. This revelation underscores the need for stricter regulations and oversight in the pet industry.

news.headline: American services industry growth slows to 3-month low.
Brookfield Infrastructure renews its normal course issuer bids for LP Units, Preferred Units, and Exchangeable Shares on TSX.
news.summary: Brookfield Infrastructure Partners L.P. (“BIP”) disclosed today that the Toronto Stock Exchange approved their plan to renew a normal course issuer bid for its outstanding limited partnership units (“LP Units”) and cumulative class A preferred limited partnership units (“Preferred Units”). Meanwhile, Brookfield Infrastructure Corporation (“BIPC”) also confirmed that the TSX greenlit their proposal to renew a normal course issuer bid for outstanding class A exchangeable subordinate voting shares (“Exchangeable Shares”). This move by BIP and BIPC reflects their strategy to enhance shareholder value and underscores their confidence in their performance.

news.headline: The Fresh Market opens 165th store in Louisville, KY, promising high-quality fresh foods and exceptional shopping experience.
news.summary: In Greensboro, North Carolina, The Fresh Market revealed the opening of their newest store in Louisville, KY this morning. Promising top-notch fresh foods and a delightful shopping atmosphere, the store is eager to introduce their dedication to freshness and outstanding service to the neighborhood. This location marks the 165th store for the specialty retailer, offering residents in Louisville a unique culinary experience.

news.headline: Madsen Mine: Connection Drift 50% done, crusher commissioned, camp installation ongoing - restart update.
news.summary: An update on the readiness for restart at Madsen Mine reveals significant progress with key milestones achieved. The Connection Drift is now halfway complete, the crusher has been successfully commissioned, and installation of the camp is currently in progress. This marks a significant step towards preparing the mine for operations, showcasing substantial developments at Madsen Mine.

news.headline: Imperial Petroleum Inc. releases financial results for Q3 and 9M 2024, operating in petroleum, crude oil, and dry bulk transportation.
news.summary: Athens, Greece - On December 2, 2024, Imperial Petroleum Inc. (NASDAQ: IMPP) revealed its unaudited financial and operating outcomes for the third quarter and nine months concluding on September 30, 2024. The Company, a ship-owning entity specializing in delivering petroleum products, crude oil, and dry bulk seaborne transportation services, shared this information with the public.

news.headline: BlackRock's latest acquisitions keep CEO Fink busy retaining top employees after recent success.
New vehicle inventory hits 3.23M units, nearing pre-pandemic levels; used vehicles steady at 1.91M units.
news.summary: In Grand Rapids, Michigan, on December 4, 2024, it was reported that the inventory of used vehicles has remained stable at 1.91 million units. Conversely, new vehicle stock on dealership lots saw an increase to 3.23 million units in November. This marked the third month in a row with growth of 90,000 units each month. These statistics were part of the findings in ZeroSum's December report on the current "State of the" automotive market.

news.headline: EIA Crude Oil Inventories Actual -5.073M (Forecast -1.41M, Previous -1.844M)
EIA Crude Cushing Inventories Actual 0.050M (Forecast -, Previous -0.909M)
EIA Gasoline Inventories Actual 2.362M (Forecast -1.039M, Previous 3.314M)
Crane 1 names Matt Biskaduros as President & CEO, bringing over 30 years of industrial services leadership.
news.summary: CINCINNATI--Crane 1 Services, Inc., a prominent independent provider of overhead crane maintenance, repair, and equipment services, has named Matt Biskaduros as its new President & CEO. With a background encompassing over thirty years in the industrial services sector, Matt will now lead the company and also serve on its Board of Directors. His leadership role at Crane 1 entails implementing new customer solutions and leveraging his extensive industry experience to drive innovation.

news.headline: Palantir stock surged 290% in 2024 post Trump's win. Investors ponder on whether to buy or sell heading into 2025.
news.summary: After experiencing a significant 290% surge in 2024, shares of Palantir have recorded a notable increase, largely attributed to the period following Trump's election victory. This boost is fueled by bullish sentiments surrounding defense budget allocations and advancements in AI automation technology. The elevated trajectory of the stock post-Trump's win has prompted discussions on whether Palantir stock presents an opportunity for investors to buy or sell as they navigate towards 2025.

news.headline: Delaware Court awards Encompass Health damages for misconduct by former officers, private equity firms; VitalCar involved.
news.summary: In a recent verdict at the Delaware Court of Chancery, Encompass Health and Enhabit successfully secured a legal victory over breaches of fiduciary responsibility by former senior officers April Anthony, Luke James, and Chris Walker at Encompass Health’s prior home health and hospice division, now Enhabit. The court ruled in favor of Encompass Health and Enhabit, holding private equity firms Vistria Group and Nautic Partners, along with the presently named VitalCar home health and hospice business, liable for the violations. This verdict signifies a significant win for Encompass Health and Enhabit in their pursuit of justice regarding this matter.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures Drop, Nvidia stock falls, Fed inflation data awaited. Key levels hit, important gauge due.
news.summary: Stock futures for the Dow Jones dropped as Nvidia's stock experienced a significant decline to a critical point on Monday. The Federal Reserve is expected to release its primary inflation measure later this week. This news raises concerns about the market's stability and potential impact on investors. Stay tuned for further updates on these developments, as fluctuations in stock prices and economic indicators continue to influence market dynamics.

news.headline: Trump considers new candidates for Treasury Secretary after flurry of picks, invites Kevin Warsh and Marc Rowan to Mar-a-Lago.
news.summary: The President-elect, Donald J. Trump, is planning to host potential candidates such as Kevin Warsh and Marc Rowan at Mar-a-Lago this week.

news.headline: Trump admin faces hurdles in removing NLRB members, including logistical challenges, say ex-officials and attorneys.
news.summary: Former agency officials and federal worker attorneys warn that any effort by the Trump administration to dismiss National Labor Relations Board members may face numerous logistical hurdles.

news.headline: DreamFactory introduces REST API Generation on Snowflake Marketplace. Customers can generate & manage APIs from Snowflake data.
news.summary: Today in Las Vegas, DreamFactory Software has introduced DreamFactory REST API Generation on Snowflake Marketplace. This new feature allows customers to effortlessly create and oversee REST APIs from their Snowflake data. By integrating Snowflake tables, views, and stored procedures with external systems, businesses can streamline processes and reduce infrastructure costs. The availability of DreamFactory REST API Generation on Snowflake Marketplace marks a significant milestone for joint customers looking to optimize data management.

news.headline: Extraordinary General Meeting of LITGRID AB shareholders on 30 December 2024, at 10:00 a.m. in Vilnius.
news.summary: LITGRID AB, with company code 302564383 and registered office at Karlo Gustavo Emilio Manerheimo g. 8, LT-05131, Vilnius, has called for an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting is set to take place on December 30, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. in hall No. 229 at the company's registered office.

news.headline: Treasury bond auction for RIKB 27 0415 and RIKS 37 0115 series with ISIN numbers to take place between 10:30-11:00 AM. Bonds delivered electronically on Settlement Date.
news.summary: During the auction between 10:30 a.m. and 11:00 a.m. on the Auction Date, the Government Debt Management is set to auction Treasury bonds in the Series specified, featuring ISIN numbers and respective Maturity Dates as outlined in the provided table. Electronic delivery of the Treasury bonds will take place on the Settlement Date.

news.headline: Deluxe CEO Barry McCarthy keynotes Dale Carnegie Convention in San Antonio, showcasing company's evolution into payments leader.
news.summary: Barry McCarthy, the President and CEO of Deluxe (NYSE: DLX), a reputable Payments and Data firm, is set to give a keynote speech at the 2024 Dale Carnegie International Convention in San Antonio on December 5. The presentation, titled “Transforming a 110-Year-Old Check Printer into a Modern Payments Powerhouse,” will shed light on the leadership techniques and groundbreaking tactics that facilitated the company's evolution into a premier figure in the payments and data sector. This marks a significant milestone in Deluxe’s journey toward becoming a pioneer in the payments industry.

news.headline: SurePoint Technologies in Texas obtains SOC 2 Type II compliance, ensuring data security for law firms.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, SurePoint Technologies, a top provider of cutting-edge legal software for mid-sized law firms, revealed its accomplishment of obtaining Service Organization Controls (SOC) 2 Type II compliance through an audit. This achievement ensures clients that SurePoint adheres to stringent security standards for their systems and data management, guaranteeing robust security, availability, and confidentiality measures. This compliance reinforces SurePoint's position as a standout player in the legal software market.

news.headline: EIA Distillate Inventories Actual 3.383M (Forecast -0.424M, Previous 0.416M)
IRG, a large property owner, acquires 221,879 sq ft manufacturing facility along Houston Ship Channel.
news.summary: Today, in Houston, on Dec. 4, 2024, Industrial Realty Group, LLC (IRG), a major owner of commercial and industrial properties in the US, has purchased a new industrial manufacturing facility. This facility spans 221,879 square feet and is located at 16730 Jacintoport Boulevard.

news.headline: Journalists at the Guardian are on strike for 48 hours, protesting the potential sale of The Observer to Tortoise Media after 50 years.
news.summary: Employees at the outlet have initiated a 48-hour strike, marking the first such action in five decades. The protest stems from a plan to transfer ownership of The Observer to Tortoise Media, a digital media startup.

news.headline: A North Carolina town is suing Duke Energy, one of the country's biggest utility companies, for disregarding climate change data.
news.summary: Duke, one of the largest utility companies in the country, has been accused by Carrboro of disregarding climate change data as they continue to ramp up their usage of fossil fuels.

news.headline: Live updates from DealBook Summit: OpenAI CEO, Sam Altman speaks now. Jerome Powell, Serena Williams, Jeff Bezos, Bill Clinton, Sundar Pichai to follow.
news.summary: Later in Manhattan, Andrew Ross Sorkin will host a discussion with notable figures such as Jerome Powell, Serena Williams, Jeff Bezos, Bill Clinton, Sundar Pichai, and more.

news.headline: Gimme Credit launches new client platform for global reach, offering state-of-the-art technology for expanded services.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, a well-known independent credit research and data provider, Gimme Credit, unveiled a cutting-edge delivery platform to support its worldwide growth. The platform, which is cloud-based, features advanced technology to cater to the company's expansion efforts. This initiative signifies a significant move for Gimme Credit as it seeks to enhance its services and reach a wider audience.

news.headline: FedLearn partners with Digital University to provide 340 online courses expanding course access.
news.summary: In Alexandria, Virginia on December 4, 2024, FedLearn, an adaptive online learning solutions provider utilizing AI technology, specializes in delivering mission-specific content for the federal government, focusing on agencies like the U.S. Department of Defense and Intelligence.

news.headline: Report on Automotive Hypervisor Industry: Market was $541.6M in 2023, projected to reach $3.2B by 2030 (CAGR 29.0%). Contains profiles of 40+ key players.
news.summary: In Dublin, the "Automotive Hypervisor - Global Strategic Business Report" has recently been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global Automotive Hypervisor market was valued at approximately US$541.6 million in 2023 and is anticipated to reach around US$3.2 billion by 2030, indicating a notable CAGR of 29.0% from 2023 to 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market insights, growth drivers, and future projections to assist in making well-informed business choices. The automotive industry is seeing significant growth in the adoption of hypervisors.

news.headline: Pure Storage's stock rose 20% after beating earnings estimates and landing a 'first-ever' flash hyperscaler cloud win.
news.summary: Pure Storage reported earnings and sales that exceeded expectations, causing a surge of 20% in their stock value. The company also celebrated securing a significant 'design win' for a hyperscale cloud, marking their 'first-ever' success in this area.

news.headline: Top UnitedHealth Group executive fatally shot in Manhattan, leading to early end of investor conference.
news.summary: Following a tragic incident in midtown Manhattan, UnitedHealth Group was forced to end its investor day prematurely. The event was cut short due to the fatal shooting of a high-ranking executive from the company. The abrupt conclusion of the conference garnered attention and generated concerning headlines. The victim's identity and further details surrounding the incident were not immediately disclosed. The unexpected turn of events rattled attendees and raised questions about the motive behind the shooting. UnitedHealth Group's decision to conclude the investor day early reverberated throughout the business community, leaving many to wonder about the implications on the company's future direction. The unfortunate disruption occurred as the executive was representing UNH, a prominent player in the healthcare industry. The incident underscores the fragility of corporate events and serves as a stark reminder of the unpredictability of such gatherings.

news.headline: Delaware court ruling on Elon Musk's pay at Tesla could impact bullish sentiment on stock.
news.summary: Elon Musk's pay package at Tesla is under scrutiny following a Delaware court ruling, potentially dampening the excitement around the company's soaring stock. The court decision may challenge investors' optimistic outlook, as Tesla stock continues to experience significant growth. Musk's compensation package and its implications are closely monitored by shareholders and experts. The outcome of this ruling could influence Tesla's future performance and the confidence of stakeholders in the company's direction.

news.headline: Eli Lilly's Zepbound outperforms Novo Nordisk's Wegovy in weight-loss study, marking a significant victory.
news.summary: Eli Lilly announced on Wednesday that its obesity drug Zepbound resulted in greater weight loss compared to Novo Nordisk's Wegovy in the first direct comparison study. This study marked a significant development in the battle of weight-loss medications. The results showed that Zepbound was more effective in promoting weight loss as compared to Wegovy. This update has sparked interest in the pharmaceutical industry and among investors.

news.headline: Palantir receives higher government secure cloud rating, improving their standing for federal contract opportunities.
news.summary: On Tuesday, the federal government upgraded Palantir's secure cloud computing services rating. Palantir received a higher federal government rating for its secure cloud services.

news.headline: Marvell's fiscal Q3 earnings surpass estimates with strong demand for custom AI chips, leading to share jump.
news.summary: Marvell reported better-than-expected fiscal Q3 earnings and revenue driven by robust demand for its custom chips used in artificial intelligence applications. This surge in performance has positioned Marvell as a competitor to Nvidia, which is reflected in the significant increase in shares following the announcement of the earnings beat.

news.headline: November jobs report indicates labor market strengthening, potentially affecting Dec. 18 Fed rate cut plans based on ISM Services Report softness.
news.summary: The jobs report for November indicates a resurgence in the labor market, casting uncertainty on a potential Federal Reserve rate cut on December 18. Despite a soft ISM Services Report, certain factors may cause the Fed to hesitate.

news.headline: Tesla aims for slight growth in vehicle deliveries in 2024 compared to 1.8 million in 2023, doubtful success.
news.summary: Tesla is projecting a minor rise in vehicle deliveries for 2024 compared to the 1.8 million delivered in 2023. The company, led by Elon Musk, aimed for growth in vehicle deliveries for the upcoming year, as reported by Investor's Business Daily. However, achieving this target may prove to be challenging.

news.headline: Toll Brothers opens model homes at three luxury communities in Cumming, Georgia - Northfield, Sterling Pointe, CrossCreek. Signature craftsmanship and designs showcased. Model Grand Opening events held recently.
news.summary: Luxury home builder, Toll Brothers, unveiled new model homes in Cumming, Georgia on December 4, 2024. The three communities are Northfield, Sterling Pointe, and CrossCreek. These model homes highlight Toll Brothers’ quality craftsmanship and unique designs. Model Grand Opening events were held at each community, with the homes now available for public tours. Residents can explore the exceptional features of these luxury homes, showcasing the best in upscale living.

news.headline: Crypto Fear and Greed Index = 78/100 = Extreme Greed
Fear and Greed Index 58/100 = Greed
Dow Jones up 280 points due to surprise ADP jobs report. Salesforce soars on earnings. Fed chief Powell to speak next.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones index saw a significant increase of 280 points following a surprising ADP jobs report. Market attention now turns to an upcoming speech by Fed chief Powell. Additionally, Salesforce experienced a notable surge in its stock value based on the latest earnings report. The positive movements in the stock market were highlighted, with the Dow Jones gain particularly standing out after the unexpected jobs data release. This optimistic trend is expected to be further influenced by Powell's speech and Salesforce's strong performance in earnings.

news.headline: Thor Industries reported Q1 sales of $2.143B, down 14.3% Y/Y, missing estimates. Q1 EPS was $(0.03) vs $0.99 prior year. Gross profit margin contracted to 13.1%. Shares trading lower pre-market. CEO optimistic for H2 recovery amid RV market weakness.
news.summary: Shares of Thor Industries, Inc. (NYSE: THO) are trading lower before the market opens on Wednesday. The company reported quarterly sales of $2.143 billion, showing a 14.3% decline from the previous year and missing the analyst consensus of $2.241 billion. First-quarter EPS was $(0.03) compared to $0.99 the previous year, with an adjusted EPS of $0.26, falling short of the expected $0.71. North American Towable RV net sales saw a 4.9% decrease year over year, North American Motorized RV net sales dropped by 29.0%, and European RV net sales were down 14.6% for the quarter. The gross profit margin for the quarter contracted by 120 basis points to 13.1%. Thor Industries finished the quarter with $445.2 million in cash and equivalents, and its inventories totaled $1.37 billion at the end of the quarter. The President and CEO, Bob Martin, stated... (For the full article, visit Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Discover Hadron by Tether, advancing asset tokenization with enhanced security, scalability, and interoperability.
news.summary: Discover how Tether's Hadron platform is transforming asset tokenization by offering cutting-edge features such as enhanced security, increased scalability, and seamless interoperability. Through this innovative platform, users can tokenize a wide range of assets with ease, ensuring greater accessibility and efficiency in the digital asset space.

news.headline: Kyndryl and Nokia expand partnership to offer advanced data center networking solutions, aiming to help enterprises modernize their networks.
news.summary: Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:KD) has recently strengthened its partnership with Nokia Corporation (NYSE:NOK) to provide cutting-edge data center networking solutions and services to international enterprises. Through this expanded agreement, Kyndryl and Nokia are combining Kyndryl’s proficiency in hybrid cloud and data center management with Nokia’s reliable networking solutions to deliver advanced data center services. The primary goal of this collaboration is to assist enterprises in modernizing and enhancing their data center networks. As part of the plan, Kyndryl intends to incorporate Nokia’s Event-Driven Automation (EDA) technology into its Kyndryl Bridge platform... (Full story is accessible on Benzinga.com)
